name: Iroha Isshiki
description:
Iroha is a 1st-year student of class 1-C in Sobu High school, introduced in Volume 7.5. Hachiman sees her as a “not cute [Komachi](https://anilist.co/character/67075/Komachi-Hikigaya)” or a “better version of [Sagami](https://anilist.co/character/85283/Minami-Sagami).”

She acts in front of anyone to maintain her “cute appearance” with the image of an innocent girl in order to keep her image well with others, but she is a sly and crafty girl underneath. She shows her true color to [Hachiman](https://anilist.co/character/67065/Hachiman-Hikigaya) and [Tobe](https://anilist.co/character/82543/Kakeru-Tobe), which irritates the former while the latter is unaware of it.
